title: Soft Music
content:
The mellow touch of music most doth wound
The soul, when it doth rather sigh, than sound.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Soft Music", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
